Name: Allow All Permissions
Description: User accepts all permissions during first-run flow.
Steps: Launch app (launchApp clearState: true, permissions all: deny). Tap I'll do it later. Accept Terms & Conditions. Skip onboarding. Permission order: Camera → Location → Nearby Devices → Notification → Photos & Videos. Allow Camera (While using), Location (Precise), Nearby, Notification, Photos (Allow all).
Expected Result: MY GALLERY displayed. All features enabled. No Permission Required dialog.
Maestro Flow: PM_20 - Permission Flow Allow All Permissions.yaml

Name: Gallery All vs Limited Access
Description: Validate full vs limited Photos & Videos access.
Steps: Launch app (launchApp clearState: true, permissions all: deny). Tap I'll do it later. Accept Terms & Conditions. Skip onboarding. Permission order: Camera → Location → Nearby Devices → Notification → Photos & Videos. Run A: Photos Allow all → verify full library. Run B: Photos Allow limited → select photos → verify subset only.
Expected Result: Allow all: full library visible. Limited: only selected photos in MY GALLERY.
